channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigeria's 10 Million Women Empowerment Rally Marks Shift Toward Substantive Gender Inclusion
item.description: The 10 Million Women Empowerment Mega Rally 2026, held at Lagos's Abuja National Stadium, marked a pivotal moment in Nigeria's journey toward gender equity. The event, attended by over 100 participant...

item.title: Alibaba Banned Claude Code Due to Alleged Security Concerns
item.description: Alibaba has implemented a ban on employees using Anthropic's Claude Code in the workplace, citing alleged backdoor risks. This move comes amid escalating tensions between Alibaba and Anthropic, with t...

item.title: VHP chief Alok Kumar says probe underway and no protection to accused in Ayodhya donation controversy
item.description: Vishwa Hindu Parishad (VHP) president Alok Kumar has stated that there is no attempt to shield anyone in the alleged embezzlement of donations linked to the Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust in Ayo...

item.title: Brisbane Clown Festival Aims to Reclaim the Joy of Clowns
item.description: Brisbane theatre maker and clown Andrew Cory is leading efforts to revive the positive tradition of clowning, which has been overshadowed by horror tropes like Pennywise and The Joker. He is launching...

item.title: Australia's World Cup exit: Popovic's substitution decisions under scrutiny
item.description: Australia's Socceroos suffered a heartbreak defeat in their World Cup knockout stage match against Egypt, losing a penalty shootout 4-2 after a 1-1 draw. Coach Tony Popovic defended his controversial ...

item.title: Sales Tax Crisis Threatens Pakistan's Cotton Ginning Industry
item.description: The article discusses the severe impact of the 18% sales tax on Pakistan's cotton ginning sector, leading to factory shutdowns and plummeting cotton prices. Cotton ginning factories in Tando Adam and ...

item.title: Three Road Accidents in Uttarakhand's Kumaon Region Result in Four Deaths and Two Injuries
item.description: Three separate road accidents occurred across Uttarakhand’s Kumaon region on Friday, resulting in four fatalities and two injuries. In Udham Singh Nagar district, a head-on collision between a motorcy...

item.title: Trump Discusses Presidential Histories and Self-Reflection in Children's Podcast
item.description: In a recent children's podcast titled 'Storytime with the Second Lady,' U.S. President Donald Trump engaged in a lighthearted discussion about former presidents while also reflecting on his own public...

item.title: Yemaya: A Production Highlighting Philippine Theater's Cultural Significance
item.description: The article discusses the theatrical production 'Yemaya,' which explores themes of cultural identity and collaboration in Philippine theater. Directed by Elise Suarez, the play blends Filipino, Spanis...

item.title: Lahore's Urban Expansion Threatens Ravi Floodplain
item.description: A 35-year satellite imagery analysis reveals rapid urbanization of Lahore into the Ravi floodplain, raising flood risks. Suparco warns that unplanned development has narrowed the floodplain, reducing ...

item.title: Joburg Weekend Events: Masego, Schalk Bezuidenhout, and Lira Perform
item.description: The article highlights three major live events happening in Joburg over the weekend. Grammy-nominated artist Masego will headline the Strictly Soul festival as part of his 'Fix Your Face' tour, perfor...

item.title: Colombian politician Abelardo Espriella symbolizes yellow shirt populism
item.description: The article discusses Abelardo Espriella, a prominent Colombian political figure known as 'El Tigre' (The Tiger), who has become a symbol of the yellow shirt movement. This movement, associated with p...

item.title: Gujarat ATS arrests eight in Jaish-e-Mohammed terror conspiracy case
item.description: The Gujarat Anti-Terrorism Squad (ATS) has arrested eight individuals, including seven from Gujarat and one from Madhya Pradesh, for allegedly conspiring to establish a network of the banned terror ou...

item.title: Keiko Fujimori Wins Peru Presidential Race Amid Political Tensions
item.description: Keiko Fujimori has narrowly secured victory in Peru's presidential election, winning 50.135% of the vote in a closely contested runoff against leftist opponent Roberto Sanchez. The result marks a sign...

item.title: FIFA Maintains England-Mexico World Cup Match Kick-Off Time Despite Initial Rescheduling Plans
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 match between England and Mexico, scheduled for Monday, 6 July, will kick off at its original time of 01:00 BST. Initially, FIFA proposed moving the game to 19:00 BST on Sunday...

item.title: Alberta's Pipeline Proposal and Separatist Tensions at the Calgary Stampede
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith and Prime Minister Mark Carney jointly announced support for a new bitumen pipeline to southern B.C., aiming to counter separatist sentiment in the oil-rich province. Th...

item.title: Kolisi Calls for National Unity as Springboks Prepare for England Match
item.description: The article discusses the Springboks' opening Test match against England in Johannesburg, highlighting concerns over ticket sales. Initially, only 21,000 tickets were sold for the 65,000-seater Ellis ...

item.title: Comelec Cancels Candidate's Eligibility in BARMM Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has canceled the certificate of candidacy (COC) of Anwar Salipada Alamada, a candidate under the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP), for the first Bangsamoro ...

item.title: Kwara Police Arrest Three Suspects in Student Murder Case
item.description: The Kwara State Police Command has confirmed the arrest of three suspects linked to the alleged abduction and murder of a student at the state Polytechnic in Ilorin. The suspects, members of the Eiye ...

item.title: LGBT cruise faces restrictions as Turkey blocks port calls
item.description: A long-planned LGBT cruise organized by Virgin Voyages has encountered significant obstacles as Turkish authorities have canceled its planned stop in the country. The provincial government cited align...
